title: Henriettea mucronata
taxonomy: Henriettea mucronata is classified as a species within the family Melastomataceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is part of the order Myrtales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Myrtaceae and Onagraceae. The genus Henriettea is a group of flowering plants endemic to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within this genus, H. mucronata is one of the recognized species. The classification of Henriettea mucronata reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
